narrative:
Center Township (precinct in Wood County) has 840 registered voters, with 45.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.6 percentage points.
